root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no, sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.ending_balance FROM sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail ,sc_acc_m_account_year WHERE sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year and sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.ending_balance > 0 and sc_mem_m_capital_stock_detail.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_mem_m_share_holding_detail where item_type = 'WD' and operate_date between sc_acc_m_account_year.beginning_of_account and sc_acc_m_account_year.ending_of_account ) /*WHERE*/ /*and sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year = 2019 --ปี*/
